claim: The framework shall supply no built-in EntityType values â€” all entity types are declared by domains in build_graph().
why: The content-free contract (R-content-free-no-business-data) extends to the entity layer: entity types are domain knowledge, not framework knowledge. Supplying built-in types would violate the blank-kit invariant and couple the framework to a particular domain model. ENFORCED 2026-07-13: TestEntityTypesAreDeclarative in internal/ontology/entity_declarative_test.go mechanically verifies this claim: a zero-value Graph has an empty EntityTypes slice, and a static source scan of internal/ and cmd/hotam/ finds no package-level var binding an EntityType value (entity types are domain-only declarations).
